rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (learning-based clarification), shows where the draft drifts from it (claim/substance mismatch), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (claim/substance mismatch).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with no regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no regressions).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not.
